posts.author: botsquad (Patrick Fallon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,
not to spread a rumour but…somebody somewhere recently mentioned a new Monday time tracking app/feature in the works, I think there was a link of some sort and now I can’t find that post/comment/link and cant remember which platform it was on.
Would love to learn more about this…
Anyone know what I’m talking about?
Cheers, Patrick

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @botsquad

Are you referring to TimesheetPro from our partner Work Perfect? You can find the app on the marketplace: https://monday.com/marketplace/10000240
